summary_en: Gakken Holdings to acquire RareJob via simplified stock exchange (no shareholder vote required for acquirer); RareJob shareholders to approve at June 25, 2026 AGM. Effective date July 31, 2026. Delisting July 29, 2026. No exchange ratio or valuation disclosed in excerpt provided.
title_en: Notice of Execution of Stock Exchange Agreement (Simplified Stock Exchange) for Complete Subsidiary Status of RareJob, Inc. by Gakken Holdings, Inc.
translation_en_brief: Gakken Holdings and RareJob announced execution of a stock exchange agreement making RareJob a wholly owned subsidiary of Gakken Holdings. The transaction is structured as a simplified stock exchange under the Companies Act, requiring no shareholder approval for Gakken (the acquirer) but mandatory approval from RareJob shareholders at the June 25, 2026 annual general meeting. The effective date is set for July 31, 2026, with delisting from the TSE Standard Market on July 29, 2026 (final trading day July 28, 2026). Gakken states the rationale as accelerating digital strategy in language learning and reskilling sectors, enabling complete integration of educational IP, online operations, learning data, systems, and content that are constrained by the current arm's-length capital partnership framework established in November 2024, and eliminating duplicate costs. The exchange ratio and valuation are not disclosed in the excerpt provided.
